app.name: Balance
app.description: A calm, lightweight, mobile-responsive household finance app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage API keys for automated access
settings.headerDescription: Review your finances, tidy up records, and keep a calm money rhythm every day.
settings.themeDescription: Choose the look that feels most comfortable. This preference is saved to your account and carried across devices when you sign in.
settings.themeLightDescription: Use Balance's signature warm cream interface.
settings.themeDarkDescription: Use a dark mode that still feels calm and comfortable.
settings.languageDescription: The active language follows the URL and is saved to your account so it stays consistent across devices.
settings.languageEnDescription: Use the full English interface across public and app pages.
settings.apiCreateDescription: API keys let Hermes or AI agents read finance summaries and write transactions without full credentials. Store the key safely. It is shown only once after creation.
settings.apiNewKeyDescription: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again after you leave this page.
settings.apiListDescription: Revoked keys can no longer be used. You can permanently delete a key from this list.
settings.apiEmpty: No API keys yet. Create your first key above.
